SOURCE: 30646367.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (30646367.pdf)
SUMMARY: Human Resources professional with over 15 years of combined HR and payroll experience in manufacturing and academic settings. Accurate preparation of employee payroll, tax information, and benefits administration.
SKILLS: ABRA, academic, Benefits, benefits administration, billing, Ceridian, conflict resolution, Crystal Reports, HRIS, Human Resources, insurance, process invoices, local government, materials, meetings, Excel, PowerPoint, Microsoft Word, Payroll, PeopleSoft, performance reviews, personnel, policies, QuickBooks, reporting, safety, sales, SAP, spreadsheets, tax, tax returns

SOURCE: 30646367.pdf
JOB TITLE: Payroll & Benefits Coordinator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2013 to 01/2014
DESCRIPTION: Processed weekly payroll for 100 associates, handled garnishments and child support, compiled labor hours, assisted with benefits enrollment.

SOURCE: 30646367.pdf
JOB TITLE: Assistant Office Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2012 to 01/2013
DESCRIPTION: Calculated daily timesheets, processed payroll and benefits changes, maintained OSHA records.

JOB TITLE: HR Assistant/Payroll
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2009 to 01/2012
DESCRIPTION: Processed weekly payroll for 100 associates, managed benefits enrollment and conflict resolution.

COMPANY: Company Name

JOB TITLE: Payroll / Human Resources Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name

DESCRIPTION: Processed weekly and biweekly payroll for over 300 associates, managed benefits enrollment.

JOB TITLE: Human Resources / Payroll Assistant

JOB TITLE: Payroll Clerk / Human Resources Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name

DESCRIPTION: Calculated bi-weekly payroll for over 200 employees, filed unemployment claims.
